mapper.select:
SELECT grid._geometry, grid.grid_txt, st_x(st_centroid(grid._geometry)) AS tmx, st_y(st_centroid(grid._geometry)) AS tmy, result.result_val, result.rgb_txt, result.analy_mgr_seq, result.jibn_addr, result.road_addr
FROM xeus.bigdata_grid_10m grid, xeus.bigdata_analy_result${analyMgrSeq} result
WHERE grid._gid = result.grid10m_gid AND result.result_val BETWEEN #{min}::numeric AND #{max}::numeric
ORDER BY result_val
SELECT max(result_val) AS max_val, min(result_val) AS min_val, count(*) FROM ${tblId}
